text: I feel a sense of anticipation standing before the glass doors, catching glimpses of glowing screens and vibrant-text murals within. When I enter, the space feels alive with ideas and creativity—technology and thought made visible. The omnipresent texts and screens invite reflection on the intersection between innovation and humanity. I am intrigued by the promise of new knowledge and the tangible manifestation of research and development, prompting me to ponder my own place in the continuum of inquiry.
